name: Red Lentil Soup (Turkish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the lentils and add them to the meat stock with 1 cup of water. Cook for 35-40 minutes until tender, then pass through a sieve.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan, add chopped onions, and fry lightly for 7-8 minutes. Add flour and brown for an additional minute. Combine this mixture with the meat stock and lentil purée, adding salt and pepper to taste. Simmer gently.
3. Beat egg yolks with cold milk, then stir into the simmering soup. Turn off heat as soon as it begins to boil. Serve with fried bread cubes in oil.
